transcript.text:
I'm not too familiar with Milmyeon
Well,
Give me everything on the menu, please
All of that by yourself?!
[Making the noobles]
[Pour in the broth]
[Mix this one up]
[Milmyeon noodles and Chicken broth]
[Chicken broth bowl]
[Let's noodle slurp]
[Eat it together]
[Eat it separately]
[What in the world?]
Looks like she'll eat like 10 bowls
Hello everyone
I'm here at Asan

There's a famous Milmyeon place here in Asan
They have been here for 65-66 years!
I'm not too familiar with Milmyeon noodles
The place indeed looks about 65 years old
Amazing [Shinjung Restaurant located in the city of Asan, Chungcheongnam-do province]
Let's head in because I'm hungry
Hello~!
Yes, welcome
Are you ready? To order?
Give me everything on that menu, please
1 of each, please
All of that by yourself?!
It seems like they don't have pork broth here I really wanted to eat that
What's the difference between Milmyeon and Naengmyeon?
The noodles?
[Milmyeon is made with flour and starch]

[Bathed in chicken broth]
[Also washed with cold water for the chewiness]
[Onmyeon] [Udon]
[Naengmyeon with spicy sauce]
[Milnaengmyeon (cold noodles with Milmyeon noodles)]
[Chicken broth bowl]
Which one is this one?
Onmyeon
This is Udon
What's the difference? The size of the noodles
Same broth? Yes
Naengmyun with spicy sauce Thank you
Looks good
Everything is here Are you eating all of this?
Thank you Enjoy your meal
Where to start?

Chicken broth bowl
Chicken broth usually have oil floating on the top
This does not have any
It's very clear
Dip it
Yum
It has a very clean flavor
Let's eat this before the noodles get bloated
This one has thicker noodles and this one is thinner Let's try the thinner one first
This is the Onmyeon
The noodles feel like Jjolmyeon
Kind of like a flour noodle
The soup is chicken itself
Is that Tzuyang?
[Not going home because of her]
The flavoring is very light

But it's very addicting
[Noodles disappear like magic]
The flavoring is not too overwhelming
It's very clean and savory
The broth is not greasy
Some radish kimchi with this
Do you like fishcake noodles? I've never had it
This guy has a fishcake noodle restaurant
You can't eat our restaurant's food like that
Not more than 5 bowls
[Don't underestimate Tzuyang]
We use huge bowls
Let's do a bet then
I'll put in 10,000,000 Won that she can finish it
Are you rich?
[Kinda scared]

The chicken flavor hits right away
A very clean and flavorful soup
I heard they're known for this
Such a clean flavor
This usually comes with cucumbers, but I asked them to not put it
So it looks very plain
Cold broth
[Shoving her face]
I've never had Pyongyang Naengmyeon before
But I feel like it'll taste similar to this
The soup is full of flavor
And it's very addicting
It feels like something is missing, yet you just can't stop
1 piece of chicken
Dip it
Wrap it

There's a good amount of noodles in here
Rip out a piece of chicken here
Not bad!
Mandu (dumplings)! Let's try 1
Big Mandu
Dip it in soy sauce
Just a very tasty dumpling
That's good
Some broth
This is a broth-less spicy noodle I've been told this is the best
Go away egg!
This is really delicious
Sweet and spicy just like Jjolmyeon
Just can't go wrong with this
These flour noodles are very chewy
I can't explain it further

I would go with the cold noodles with broth even if both are very delicious
It's very nice
Udon this time
This is probably very bloated
It hardened
The noodles are thicker
Not sure if it's because it's been sitting here, but these taste the same
But I think the thinner noodles are better
How the soup is really soaked into the noodles
[She is having a meal]
[She's not done yet]
Chicken skin
I have to save these
Let's just eat it while it's still warm
Are you eating all of that by yourself? Yes
Can you eat more after eating all that chicken?

Yes, usually
[Really shocked]
She can probably eat 10 bowls
[He's watching her YouTube videos]
She's eating this much Kimbap
I can't get this into my mouth
Let's try it again
She's eating the dumpling in 1 bite That's crazy
Let's eat this with gloves
[Making a handle with the bone]
[Debone skill Lvl 9999999]
[Very busy hands] Pick out the meat
[Let's give her some time]
This feels like Korean native chicken because of its color, size, and the texture
[On a video call]
It's Tzuyang!

Hurry and come here if you want to see her
How long is she staying there for? She's eating now, hurry and come
I'm on my way
[I got you]
He's a fan of yours He's a huge guy
Where does all that food go to?
She just digests fast
[The video is not paused]
[New props]
Mix some chicken in here
Hello (The fan really came during his shift)
[Cheers her on]
Sit here and watch
He likes you a lot
I'm a huge fan Thank you
[Back to picking out the meat]

This looks very similar to Jjolmyeon
This is really delicious
The kids will also love it
There's not much food left
1 last dumpling!
I'll eat that last actually
1 last dumpling!
1 cup of water, please
[Dumpling and water mukbang]
That was nice
It was very unique
How they only used chicken broth and not beef broth to make Milmyeon
I think the combination of flour noodles and chicken broth is very unique itself
It was very evident how they were able to hold their ground for 65 years
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
